title: Protocol for training MERGE: A federated multi-input neural network for COVID-19 prognosis
author: Casella, Riviera, et al.

steps.title: Before you begin
steps.instruction: This section includes the minimal hardware and software requirements, the framework installation procedures, and the data collection and preprocessing stages. The time required for the following preparation steps heavily depends on the specifics of the devices. These procedures must be executed on each available machine, except if they have a shared file system.

steps.title: Before you begin
steps.instruction: The protocol below describes the specific steps for training a centralized and a federated multi-input NN for COVID-19 prognosis. The protocol can also be used with different data sources containing both images and tabular data; indeed, we have also used this protocol for Alzheimer’s disease detection.

steps.title: Step-by-step method details
steps.instruction: Herein, we describe Step-by-step methods for training MERGE, a federated multi-input NN for COVID-19 prognosis. Before showing the steps for training a federated model, we describe the stages for a centralized scenario in which the data are collected in a single data lake. To illustrate these various steps, we use, as an example, the training of a multi-input NN in both a centralized and federated version.
